text: I was walking south along Maple Street at approximately 9:15 in the evening when I heard raised voices near the parking lot. I turned and saw two individuals standing beside a dark-coloured hatchback.
The taller of the two was wearing a grey hooded sweatshirt and carrying a backpack. He glanced in my direction, then both of them got into the vehicle and drove off toward the highway.

Officers responded to a report of a break-in at the premises at 02:40. Point of entry appeared to be a forced rear window. No suspects were on scene upon arrival; the area was cordoned for forensic examination.
Recovered items were logged into evidence and photographed in situ. A partial shoe impression was identified near the entry point and preserved for comparison analysis.

Q: Can you describe what you observed when you entered the building?
A: The front office was in disarray. Drawers were open and papers were scattered across the floor.
Q: Did you touch anything?
A: No. I stepped back immediately and called it in.
